task:
Edit /home/user/godot_projects/anim_fade_game/main.tscn. The scene currently contains a Node2D root named 'Root' and a Sprite2D child named 'Sprite2D'.

Add an AnimationPlayer node named 'AnimationPlayer' as a child of Root, plus an embedded Animation sub_resource named 'fade_in' (length 1.0 seconds) that animates the Sprite2D's 'modulate:a' property from 0.0 at time 0 to 1.0 at time 1.0. Wire the animation into an AnimationLibrary sub_resource and assign it to the AnimationPlayer's 'libraries' property under the empty library name "".

The scene must include these text fragments exactly:

[sub_resource type="Animation" id="Anim_fade"]
resource_name = "fade_in"
length = 1.0
tracks/0/path = NodePath("Sprite2D:modulate:a")

[sub_resource type="AnimationLibrary" id="AnimLib_1"]

[node name="AnimationPlayer" type="AnimationPlayer" parent="."]

Save the file.

verification.description: track path targets Sprite2D modulate alpha
